titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Office of the President, Yale University, Gifts Received
Office of the President, Yale University, Gifts Received
titlestmt.author: compiled by Daniel Hartwig

controlnote.p: This encoded finding aid is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday September 3, 2020 at 10:04

did.unittitle: Office of the president, Yale University, gifts received
did.abstract: The records consist of letters, maps, scrapbooks, works of art, and other assorted objects given to the president of Yale University as gifts. Included are gifts received from the president of Wuhan University in the People's Republic of China, Moscow State University, Famille Aycardi Archives, and the American Association of Teachers of Spanish and Portuguese.

odd.head: General note
odd.p: Forms part of Yale Record Group 2-A (YRG 2-A), Records of the Yale president's office.

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Office of the President, Yale University, Gifts Received (RU 393). Manuscripts and Archives, Yale University Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: The records are arranged by accession.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: The records consist of letters, maps, scrapbooks, works of art, and other assorted objects given to the president of Yale University as gifts. Included are gifts received from the president of Wuhan University in the People's Republic of China, Moscow State University, Famille Aycardi Archives, and the American Association of Teachers of Spanish and Portuguese.

did.unittitle: Posters and prints received by A. Bartlett Giamatti during his tenure as President of Yale University

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Gift book from Tsao Shiam-jye concerning research on the ancient culture of China

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

Greeting to the President from the Kiel University
Greeting to the President from Cornelle University
Greeting to the President and Faculty from the Senate of the University of St. Andrews. Dedication the Sterling Chemistry Laboratories
Greetings to the President and Faculty from the Rector and the Senate of the University of Frederic Halen
Greeting to the President and Faculty from the Senate of the University of Upsalen
Greeting to the President and Faculty from the University of Edinburg
Greeting to the President from the Senate of the University of Holmien
Greeting to the President and Faculty from the College Committee of the United Free Church of Scotland.
Greeting to the President and Fellows from the Johns Hopkins University
Greeting to the President and Faculty from the Senate of the University of Glasgow

accessrestrict.p: The materials are open for research.

did.unittitle: Glass Building - China Public Radio
Business Card Holder - Ningbo Education Committee
Picture - Masks/faces - Mayor of Shanghai
Picture of Fudan University - Fudan University
Plastic Plate - Hunan University
Postcard package from the Lucoral Museum and six compact disks in a gift bag from Lucoral & Lupearl Group, with business card of Dah-Kuen Shieh attached
Ningbo University brochure
Lapel Pin - Fudan University logo - Fudan University
2 Guanghua School of Management, Peking University catalogs
Peking University Education Foundation information packet and Peking University gift bag (empty)
Dunhuang Symphony - commemorative bookplates of the Centennial Anniversary (2)
Large Ceramic Plate - Ningbo Education Commission

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: Item is permanently restricted due to physical condition.

Red and Green Vase in silk lined box from Peking University

World Knowledge Forum certificate, Seoul, Korea
Black lacquer box, gift from Waseda University
Honorary Doctorate, University of Tokyo (English and Japanese translations)
Citation ["Waseda's first ever Yale University Day"] in English and Japanese, Waseda University
Diploma, Honorary Doctorate, University of Tokyo
